round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent effectively used cross-agent evidence (regulatory, landscape) to narrow down the Spanish-speaking candidates from a global list to the specific Southern Cone region.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized regulatory and linguistic data to confirm the location within the Southern Cone, moving from medium to high confidence.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent used regulatory and meta evidence to constrain the botanical possibilities, correctly identifying the Pampas region.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent integrated meta evidence (truck style, poles) to strengthen the case for Argentina over other right-hand traffic countries.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent combined regulatory and landscape evidence to reinforce the identification of specific Argentine infrastructure features.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the primary ambiguity (Argentina vs. Uruguay) and utilized the specific meta-evidence (truck style, poles) to break the tie. The synthesis is strong, though the text cuts off at the end.
